summaryAm: ሁለት ልጆች በጫካ ውስጥ በመረጋጋት፣ በመተባበር እና በተስፋ ወደ ቤታቸው የሚመለሱበት የተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: በአስቸጋሪ ጊዜ መረጋጋት፣ መተባበር እና እርዳታ መጠየቅ ይረዳል።

source.name: Grimm fairy tale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with fear and danger softened for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: ሀንሰል እና ግሬቴል ከቤታቸው አጠገብ ባለው ጫካ ዳር አበቦችን ይመለከቱ ነበር። ወፎች በቀስታ ይዘምሩ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Hansel and Gretel looked at flowers near the edge of the woods.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Hansel and Gretel near a friendly forest edge with wildflowers and soft morning light.

pages.textAm: በመጫወት ላይ ሳሉ መንገዱን ትንሽ ርቀው ሄዱ። ግሬቴል “እንቆምና በቀስታ እናስብ” አለች።
pages.textEn: While playing, they walked a little too far from the path.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Two children pausing calmly on a leafy forest path, looking around thoughtfully.

pages.textAm: ሀንሰል ትንንሽ ነጭ ድንጋዮችን አስታወሰ። “በመንገድ ላይ ያየናቸውን ምልክቶች እንከተል” አለ።
pages.textEn: Hansel remembered the small white stones they had seen.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Hansel pointing to small white stones on a safe forest trail while Gretel smiles.

pages.textAm: በጫካው መካከል ቀለም ያለው ትንሽ ቤት አገኙ። በውስጡ የሚኖረው አሮጊት ሴት ውሃ ሰጠቻቸው እና መንገዱን ጠቆመቻቸው።
pages.textEn: They found a colorful little house where an old woman kindly gave directions.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A colorful cottage in the woods with a kind old woman offering water and directions.

pages.textAm: ልጆቹ እጅ በእጅ ተያይዘው ድንጋዮቹን ተከተሉ። ሰማዩም በቀስታ ብርሃን ጀመረ።
pages.textEn: The children held hands and followed the stones as the sky grew bright.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Hansel and Gretel holding hands and following white stones through a bright forest path.

pages.textAm: ብዙም ሳይቆይ የቤታቸውን መብራት አዩ። ቤተሰባቸው በደስታ ተቀበላቸው፣ ልጆቹም ከዚያ ቀን በኋላ አንዳቸው አንዳቸውን በቅርብ ይጠብቁ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Soon they saw the light of home and were welcomed with joy.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The children returning home safely at sunset, family welcoming them warmly.
